task_completion.description: Open the NSF formatting requirements document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/nsf_formatting_requirements.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the unformatted NSF proposal document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processing application (e.g., Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer) displaying the nsf_proposal.odt document.

task_completion.description: Format the main section headings of the proposal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Main headings such as 'Cover Page', 'Project Summary', 'Project Description', and 'Budget Justification' are visually distinct (e.g., bolded, enlarged, or centered) using the word processor's formatting tools.
The 'Project Summary' section clearly contains distinct, formatted subsections for 'Overview', 'Intellectual Merit', and 'Broader Impacts'.
A structured table or aligned text in the Budget Justification section with columns for 'Category', 'Year 1', 'Year 2', 'Year 3', and 'Total'.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted proposal back to the original file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's save dialog or a status indicator showing the document has been saved to /home/ga/Documents/nsf_proposal.odt, or a file manager/terminal showing an updated modification time for the file.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a graphical word processor (like Calligra Words) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to manipulate the .odt file.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual document formatting rather than plain text workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the application's UI (toolbars, menus, style panels) to apply bolding, alignment, or spacing, rather than typing markdown symbols (like **bold**) into the text.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or overwrite the core proposal content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main text of the proposal, including keywords like 'biochar', 'bioretention', and the PI name 'Dr. Elena Vasquez', remains visible and intact in the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The proposal is for 'Biochar-Amended Bioretention Systems for Enhanced Stormwater Treatment in Urban Watersheds' by PI 'Dr. Elena Vasquez' at 'Pacific Northwest University'. Required main headings: Cover Page, Project Summary, Table of Contents, Project Description, References Cited, Budget Justification, Biographical Sketch. Project Summary must have subsections: Overview, Intellectual Merit, Broader Impacts. Project Description must have subsections: Introduction and Motivation, Background and Related Work, Research Plan, Expected Outcomes, Timeline and Milestones. Budget table columns must be: Category, Year 1, Year 2, Year 3, Total. Note: The biographical text correctly states 'Dr. Elena Vasquez has over 15 years of experience' (do not penalize if you see the full name instead of just 'Dr. Vasquez').
